description:
mDNS Browser

mDNS Browser
What's Changed
:sparkles: New features
- Build void-linux xbps-package @hrzlgnm
The latest release is also a custom repository for void packages.
One can add it by creating a custom repository config file with
repository=https://github.com/hrzlgnm/mdns-browser/releases/latest in e.g. /etc/xbps.d/mdns-browser-repo
🧰 Maintenance
- #881 chore(ci): Enable sccache @hrzlgnm
:recycle: Refactor
- #871 refactor: Make logging a noop in macro log_fn in release build @hrzlgnm
- #872 refactor: Move inline style to CSS @hrzlgnm
:arrow_up: Dependency Updates
- #868 fix(deps): update rust crate clap to v4.5.34 @renovate[bot]
- #869 chore(deps): update dependency trunk to v0.21.11 @renovate[bot]
- #870 chore(deps): update dependency trunk to v0.21.12 @renovate[bot]
- #879 chore(config): migrate renovate config @renovate[bot]
- #878 chore(deps): update crate-ci/typos action to v1.31.0 @renovate[bot]
- #880 chore(deps): update dependency trunk to v0.21.12 @renovate[bot]
Auditable binaries since v0.8.x
The binaries built for desktop targets are now all build in auditable mode using cargo-auditable.
For information on how to audit the binaries see UsageAttested build artifacts since v0.8.x
The build artifacts are now attested. Attestations information about the binaries is available here. For more information and details on how to verify those, see Verifying artifact attestations with the GitHub CLI
